sn35.125:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling among the Vajjians at Hatthigama. Then the householder Ugga of Hatthigama approached the Blessed One … and said to him….[n.114] At AN I 26,12 he is declared the foremost of those who attend on the Saṅgha (etadaggaṁ saṅgh’ upādāyakānaṃ); see too AN IV 212–16.
